subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Hearken unto the answers to thy questions, which stream forth from the Pen of God. And as to that which thou didst ask concerning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی بشنو جوابهای سوالات خود را که از قلم الله جاری میگردد و اما ما سئلت فی
subcodes.subjects: @freedom of thought and action, @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @bribery and corruption, @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
